simple_types.name: bcm2835SPIChipSelect
simple_types.code:
type bcm2835SPIChipSelect is
  (BCM2835_SPI_CS0, BCM2835_SPI_CS1, BCM2835_SPI_CS2, BCM2835_SPI_CS_NONE);
